required_evidence: Velocity x Depth zones, behavior cohorts, segment overlay rows
current_observation: Saved V4 exports contain 174 Velocity x Depth strategy rows and 7 behavior-segment overlay rows.
interpretation: Behavior evidence is ready to receive an aggregate outcome metric join.

current_observation: No retained V4 CSV contains a real support, onboarding, sales, revenue, ticket, cycle-time, conversion, backlog, escalation, or KPI metric column.
interpretation: Outcome evidence is missing; low value cannot be inferred from missing outcome data.

current_observation: Behavior windows exist, but no outcome baseline or comparison windows are attached.
interpretation: Outcome joins require the business metric to use the same fixed-window logic.

required_evidence: baseline time, cost, volume, capacity, or accepted KPI assumption
current_observation: The value strategy layer lists required customer-owned assumptions, but no assumption ledger is present in saved exports.
interpretation: No dollarized or time-saved range can be built without explicit customer-owned assumptions.

required_evidence: eligible monetary status supported by outcome evidence
current_observation: Value strategy rows are blocked: 26 pending outcome evidence, 37 suppressed, and 111 pending trust evidence.
interpretation: Current saved data supports value investigation routing, not economic output.

required_evidence: approved pre/post, holdout, or counterfactual design
current_observation: No saved export contains a causal design identifier or intervention ledger join.
interpretation: Outcome movement, once joined, can support descriptive investigation but not causal claims.

required_evidence: aggregate segment or workflow key only, cohort size, suppression status
current_observation: Current research outputs are aggregate-only and avoid user identifiers.
interpretation: The outcome join can be designed without individual-level output.

current_observation: Support and onboarding have cleaner operational metrics than sales for a first bounded test.
interpretation: Start with aggregate support or onboarding metrics before sales or revenue-linked analysis.
